name: Patty Ann's Lucious Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover 2/3 cup dried apricots with water.
Boil for 10 minutes, then drain and chop.
2. Mix softened butter or margarine (1/2 cup) with granulated sugar (1/4 cup).
3. Sift together sifted flour (1 cup), baking powder (1/2 teaspoon), and salt (1/4 teaspoon).
Pack the mixture evenly into a greased 7 x 11-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs (2) with brown sugar (1 cup) and vanilla extract (1/2 teaspoon).
6. Add the sifted flour mixture from step 3 to the egg mixture.
7. Stir in chopped walnuts or pecans (1/2 cup).
8. Spread over the baked layer and bake for an additional 30 minutes or until done.
9. Cool in the pan, then cut into bars.
10. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper.
